gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/50)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/50)
text: قَالَ لِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ سَفِينَةَ نُوحٍ كَانَتْ مَأْمُورَةً طَافَتْ بِالْبَيْتِ حَيْثُ غَرِقَتِ الْأَرْضُ ثُمَّ أَتَتْ مِنًى فِي أَيَّامِهَا ثُمَّ رَجَعَتِ السَّفِينَةُ وَ كَانَتْ مَأْمُورَةً وَ طَافَتْ بِالْبَيْتِ طَوَافَ النِّسَاءِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from one of his companions, from Al Washa, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza who said,

‘Abu Al-Hassanasws said to me: ‘The ark of Noahas was Commanded to circumambulate the House (Kaaba) when the land was drowned. Then it came to Mina during its days, and then the ark returned. It was Commanded to circumambulate with the House, a circumambulation of the women (Tawaaf Al-Nisa)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from certain individuals of his people from al-Washsha’ from Ali ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once said to me, ‘Noah’s Ark was commanded to perform Tawaf around the House as the land was submerged in water; then it went to Mina during its days, then it returned back and it was commanded to perform Tawaf around the House in the form of Tawaf of women.’”
